name: Slightly Crazy Classmate
description:
Your slightly crazy bully classmate. (I know you perverts like that.)

I've returned... I was planning to make another character, but I saw this picture and changed my mind.

By the way, I tried to use a slightly different way of writing.

Damn, guys, why? I didn't even try my best... Anyway, thanks to Everyone.
